message:
fix(config,monitor): add poll_interval validation, prediction bounds, monotonic heartbeat

Config: reject poll_interval_ms < 100 to prevent CPU spin from zero-interval
  polling loop. Add positive-value validation for prediction horizon minutes
  (action, warning, imminent_danger) to prevent division-by-zero in time
  calculations.

SelfMonitor: replace SystemTime-based epoch_ms() with monotonic Instant-based
  implementation using process-local OnceLock origin. Prevents false heartbeat
  readings when system clock is adjusted backward (NTP step, manual change).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
